/CAL: I&A, PLEA/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 10-06-21/X: THE30TH DAY IS 11-04-21 AND THE 60TH LAST DAY IS 11-22-21/X: MOTION TO DETAINWITHOUT BAIL GRANTED/X:THE COURT FINDS BY CLEAR AND CONVINCING EVIDENCE THAT RELEASING THE DEFENDANT OR LESS RESTRICTIVE ALTERNATIVES TO INCARCERATION WOULD NOT/X:REASONABLY PROTECT THE PUBLIC OR THE VICTIM/X:THE COURT MAKES FURTHER FACTUAL FINDINGS ON THE RECORD,/NB/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:10-06-21/M12/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 1001,36 FOR REFERRAL TO MHD/JAIL PSY/MHD/REP:10-13-21/M12/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING (TE 1 HR) AND 4011,6 REPORT ON 10-05-21 AND RECEIPT OF REPORT FROM JPS FOR MENTAL HEALTH DIVERSION REFERRAL ON 10-13-21/DOPC/
